name: LV_323_02_STINVTOT
definition:
CREATE VIEW [DBO].[LV_323_02_STINVTOT]
AS
WITH CTE
     AS (SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                PLNPRODIN,
                PLNPRODOUT,
                PLNOTHERIN,
                PLNOTHEROUT,
                PLNWHOUSEIN,
                PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                TEMPIN,
                TEMPOUT,
                0 RESERVED,
                0 ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                ACTPRODIN,
                ACTOTHERIN,
                0 ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                ACTWASTE,
                ACTOTHEROUT,
                TRANSFERRED,
                AVGVALUE,
                AVGCURRVAL,
                PURAMNT,
                PURCASH,
                PURCURR,
                SALAMNT,
                SALCASH,
                SALCURR,
                ONHAND,
                ACTWHOUSEIN,
                ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                COUNTADD,
                COUNTDEC,
                0 DISTRESERVED,
                ONVEHICLE,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V1 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
          WHERE TYP = 0
         UNION ALL
   SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                PLNPRODIN,
                PLNPRODOUT,
                PLNOTHERIN,
                PLNOTHEROUT,
                PLNWHOUSEIN,
                PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                TEMPIN,
                TEMPOUT,
                RESERVED,
                ACTPORDER,
                RECEIVED,
                ACTPRODIN,
                ACTOTHERIN,
                ACTSORDER,
                SHIPPED,
                ACTWASTE,
                ACTOTHEROUT,
                TRANSFERRED,
                AVGVALUE,
                AVGCURRVAL,
                PURAMNT,
                PURCASH,
                PURCURR,
                SALAMNT,
                SALCASH,
                SALCURR,
                ONHAND,
                ACTWHOUSEIN,
                ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                COUNTADD,
                COUNTDEC,
                DISTRESERVED,
                ONVEHICLE,
                VARIANTREF,
                MEETPLANIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                ONHAND_AVG
   FROM(
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                PLNPRODIN PLNPRODIN,
                PLNPRODOUT PLNPRODOUT,
                PLNOTHERIN PLNOTHERIN,
                PLNOTHEROUT PLNOTHEROUT,
                PLNWHOUSEIN PLNWHOUSEIN,
                PLNWHOUSEOUT PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                TEMPIN TEMPIN,
                TEMPOUT TEMPOUT,
                RESERVED RESERVED,
                ACTPORDER ACTPORDER,
                RECEIVED RECEIVED,
                ACTPRODIN ACTPRODIN,
                ACTOTHERIN ACTOTHERIN,
                ACTSORDER ACTSORDER,
                SHIPPED SHIPPED,
                ACTWASTE ACTWASTE,
                ACTOTHEROUT ACTOTHEROUT,
                TRANSFERRED TRANSFERRED,
                AVGVALUE AVGVALUE,
                AVGCURRVAL AVGCURRVAL,
                PURAMNT PURAMNT,
                PURCASH PURCASH,
                PURCURR PURCURR,
                SALAMNT SALAMNT,
                SALCASH SALCASH,
                SALCURR SALCURR,
                ONHAND ONHAND,
                ACTWHOUSEIN ACTWHOUSEIN,
                ACTWHOUSEOUT ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                COUNTADD COUNTADD,
                COUNTDEC COUNTDEC,
                0 DISTRESERVED,
                ONVEHICLE ONVEHICLE,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODIN PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODOUT PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                ONHAND_AVG ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V2 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
          WHERE TYP = 0 AND INVENNO = ORFINVENNO
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                PLNPRODIN PLNPRODIN,
                PLNPRODOUT PLNPRODOUT,
                PLNOTHERIN PLNOTHERIN,
                PLNOTHEROUT PLNOTHEROUT,
                PLNWHOUSEIN PLNWHOUSEIN,
                PLNWHOUSEOUT PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                TEMPIN TEMPIN,
                TEMPOUT TEMPOUT,
                0 RESERVED,
                0 ACTPORDER,
                RECEIVED RECEIVED,
                ACTPRODIN ACTPRODIN,
                ACTOTHERIN ACTOTHERIN,
                0 ACTSORDER,
                SHIPPED SHIPPED,
                ACTWASTE ACTWASTE,
                ACTOTHEROUT ACTOTHEROUT,
                TRANSFERRED TRANSFERRED,
                AVGVALUE AVGVALUE,
                AVGCURRVAL AVGCURRVAL,
                PURAMNT PURAMNT,
                PURCASH PURCASH,
                PURCURR PURCURR,
                SALAMNT SALAMNT,
                SALCASH SALCASH,
                SALCURR SALCURR,
                ONHAND ONHAND,
                ACTWHOUSEIN ACTWHOUSEIN,
                ACTWHOUSEOUT ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                COUNTADD COUNTADD,
                COUNTDEC COUNTDEC,
                0 DISTRESERVED,
                ONVEHICLE ONVEHICLE,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODIN PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODOUT PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                ONHAND_AVG ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V2 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
          WHERE TYP = 0 AND INVENNO <> ORFINVENNO
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                ORFINVENNO,
                DATE_,
                PLNPRODIN PLNPRODIN,
                PLNPRODOUT PLNPRODOUT,
                PLNOTHERIN PLNOTHERIN,
                PLNOTHEROUT PLNOTHEROUT,
                PLNWHOUSEIN PLNWHOUSEIN,
                PLNWHOUSEOUT PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                0 TEMPIN,
                0 TEMPOUT,
                RESERVED RESERVED,
                ACTPORDER ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                ACTPRODIN ACTPRODIN,
                ACTOTHERIN ACTOTHERIN,
                ACTSORDER ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                ACTWASTE ACTWASTE,
                ACTOTHEROUT ACTOTHEROUT,
                TRANSFERRED TRANSFERRED,
                0 AVGVALUE,
                0 AVGCURRVAL,
                0 PURAMNT,
                0 PURCASH,
                0 PURCURR,
                0 SALAMNT,
                0 SALCASH,
                0 SALCURR,
                0 ONHAND,
                ACTWHOUSEIN ACTWHOUSEIN,
                ACTWHOUSEOUT ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                COUNTADD COUNTADD,
                COUNTDEC COUNTDEC,
                0 DISTRESERVED,
                ONVEHICLE ONVEHICLE,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODIN PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                PLNRSRVPRODOUT PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                ONHAND_AVG ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V2 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
          WHERE TYP = 0 AND INVENNO <> ORFINVENNO) INNERTAB
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                0 PLNPRODIN,
                0 PLNPRODOUT,
                0 PLNOTHERIN,
                0 PLNOTHEROUT,
                0 PLNWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                0 TEMPIN,
                0 TEMPOUT,
                RESERVED*(CASE WHEN STATUS = 4 THEN 1
                   WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 0 THEN 0
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 1 AND STATUS = 1 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 256 AND STATUS = 2 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 257 AND STATUS IN (1,2) THEN 1
                      ELSE 0
                  END) RESERVED,
                ACTPORDER*(CASE WHEN STATUS = 4 THEN 1
                   WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 0 THEN 0
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 1 AND STATUS = 1 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 256 AND STATUS = 2 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 257 AND STATUS IN (1,2) THEN 1
                      ELSE 0
                  END) ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                0 ACTPRODIN,
                0 ACTOTHERIN,
                ACTSORDER*(CASE WHEN STATUS = 4 THEN 1
                   WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 0 THEN 0
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 1 AND STATUS = 1 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 256 AND STATUS = 2 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 257 AND STATUS IN (1,2) THEN 1
                      ELSE 0
                  END) ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                0 ACTWASTE,
                0 ACTOTHEROUT,
                0 TRANSFERRED,
                0 AVGVALUE,
                0 AVGCURRVAL,
                0 PURAMNT,
                0 PURCASH,
                0 PURCURR,
                0 SALAMNT,
                0 SALCASH,
                0 SALCURR,
                0 ONHAND,
                0 ACTWHOUSEIN,
                0 ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                0 COUNTADD,
                0 COUNTDEC,
                0 DISTRESERVED,
                0 ONVEHICLE,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                0 ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V3 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS FPARAM
    ON(FPARAM.FIRMNR = '323' AND FPARAM.MODULENR  = 10
       AND FPARAM.CODE = 'SALES_SORDRESERVESTAT')
          WHERE TYP = 0
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                0 PLNPRODIN,
                0 PLNPRODOUT,
                0 PLNOTHERIN,
                0 PLNOTHEROUT,
                0 PLNWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                0 TEMPIN,
                0 TEMPOUT,
                RESERVED*(CASE WHEN STATUS = 4 THEN 1
                   WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 0 THEN 0
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 1 AND STATUS = 1 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 256 AND STATUS = 2 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 257 AND STATUS IN (1,2) THEN 1
                      ELSE 0
                  END) RESERVED,
                ACTPORDER*(CASE WHEN STATUS = 4 THEN 1
                   WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 0 THEN 0
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 1 AND STATUS = 1 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 256 AND STATUS = 2 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 257 AND STATUS IN (1,2) THEN 1
                      ELSE 0
                  END) ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                0 ACTPRODIN,
                0 ACTOTHERIN,
                ACTSORDER*(CASE WHEN STATUS = 4 THEN 1
                   WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 0 THEN 0
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 1 AND STATUS = 1 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 256 AND STATUS = 2 THEN 1
                      WHEN ISNULL(FPARAM.VALUE,0) = 257 AND STATUS IN (1,2) THEN 1
                      ELSE 0
                  END) ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                0 ACTWASTE,
                0 ACTOTHEROUT,
                0 TRANSFERRED,
                0 AVGVALUE,
                0 AVGCURRVAL,
                0 PURAMNT,
                0 PURCASH,
                0 PURCURR,
                0 SALAMNT,
                0 SALCASH,
                0 SALCURR,
                0 ONHAND,
                0 ACTWHOUSEIN,
                0 ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                0 COUNTADD,
                0 COUNTDEC,
                0 DISTRESERVED,
                0 ONVEHICLE,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                0 ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V5 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS FPARAM
    ON(FPARAM.FIRMNR = '323' AND FPARAM.MODULENR  = 10
       AND FPARAM.CODE = 'SALES_SORDRESERVESTAT')
          WHERE TYP = 0
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_ AS DATE_,
                0 PLNPRODIN,
                0 PLNPRODOUT,
                0 PLNOTHERIN,
                0 PLNOTHEROUT,
                0 PLNWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                0 TEMPIN,
                0 TEMPOUT,
                0 RESERVED,
                0 ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                0 ACTPRODIN,
                0 ACTOTHERIN,
                0 ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                0 ACTWASTE,
                0 ACTOTHEROUT,
                0 TRANSFERRED,
                0 AVGVALUE,
                0 AVGCURRVAL,
                0 PURAMNT,
                0 PURCASH,
                0 PURCURR,
                0 SALAMNT,
                0 SALCASH,
                0 SALCURR,
                0 ONHAND,
                0 ACTWHOUSEIN,
                0 ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                0 COUNTADD,
                0 COUNTDEC,
                DISTRESERVED1,
                ONVEHICLE1,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                0 ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V4 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
          WHERE TYP = 0
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DORDGODATE AS DATE_,
                0 PLNPRODIN,
                0 PLNPRODOUT,
                0 PLNOTHERIN,
                0 PLNOTHEROUT,
                0 PLNWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                0 TEMPIN,
                0 TEMPOUT,
                0 RESERVED,
                0 ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                0 ACTPRODIN,
                0 ACTOTHERIN,
                0 ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                0 ACTWASTE,
                0 ACTOTHEROUT,
                0 TRANSFERRED,
                0 AVGVALUE,
                0 AVGCURRVAL,
                0 PURAMNT,
                0 PURCASH,
                0 PURCURR,
                0 SALAMNT,
                0 SALCASH,
                0 SALCURR,
                0 ONHAND,
                0 ACTWHOUSEIN,
                0 ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                0 COUNTADD,
                0 COUNTDEC,
                DISTRESERVED2,
                ONVEHICLE2,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                0 ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V4 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
          WHERE DORDGODATE IS NOT NULL AND TYP = 0
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DORDRETURNDATE AS DATE_,
                0 PLNPRODIN,
                0 PLNPRODOUT,
                0 PLNOTHERIN,
                0 PLNOTHEROUT,
                0 PLNWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNWHOUSEOUT,
                0 TEMPIN,
                0 TEMPOUT,
                0 RESERVED,
                0 ACTPORDER,
                0 RECEIVED,
                0 ACTPRODIN,
                0 ACTOTHERIN,
                0 ACTSORDER,
                0 SHIPPED,
                0 ACTWASTE,
                0 ACTOTHEROUT,
                0 TRANSFERRED,
                0 AVGVALUE,
                0 AVGCURRVAL,
                0 PURAMNT,
                0 PURCASH,
                0 PURCURR,
                0 SALAMNT,
                0 SALCASH,
                0 SALCURR,
                0 ONHAND,
                0 ACTWHOUSEIN,
                0 ACTWHOUSEOUT,
                0 COUNTADD,
                0 COUNTDEC,
                DISTRESERVED3,
                ONVEHICLE3,
                0 VARIANTREF,
                0 MEETPLANIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODIN,
                0 PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
                0 PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT,
                0 ONHAND_AVG
           FROM LV_323_02_STINVTOT_V4 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
          WHERE DORDRETURNDATE IS NOT NULL AND TYP = 0)
  SELECT 1 AS LOGICALREF,
         STOCKREF,
         INVENNO,
         DATE_,
         SUM(PLNPRODIN) AS PLNPRODIN,
         SUM(PLNPRODOUT) AS PLNPRODOUT,
         SUM(PLNOTHERIN) AS PLNOTHERIN,
         SUM(PLNOTHEROUT) AS PLNOTHEROUT,
         SUM(PLNWHOUSEIN) AS PLNWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(PLNWHOUSEOUT) AS PLNWHOUSEOUT,
         SUM(TEMPIN) AS TEMPIN,
         SUM(TEMPOUT) AS TEMPOUT,
         SUM(RESERVED) AS RESERVED,
         SUM(ACTPORDER) AS ACTPORDER,
         SUM(RECEIVED) AS RECEIVED,
         SUM(ACTPRODIN) AS ACTPRODIN,
         SUM(ACTOTHERIN) AS ACTOTHERIN,
         SUM(ACTSORDER) AS ACTSORDER,
         SUM(SHIPPED) AS SHIPPED,
         SUM(ACTWASTE) AS ACTWASTE,
         SUM(ACTOTHEROUT) AS ACTOTHEROUT,
         SUM(TRANSFERRED) AS TRANSFERRED,
         SUM(AVGVALUE / (CASE WHEN ONHAND_AVG = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ONHAND_AVG END))
            AS AVGVALUE,
         SUM(
            AVGCURRVAL / (CASE WHEN ONHAND_AVG = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ONHAND_AVG END))
            AS AVGCURRVAL,
         SUM(PURAMNT) AS PURAMNT,
         SUM(PURCASH) AS PURCASH,
         SUM(PURCURR) AS PURCURR,
         SUM(SALAMNT) AS SALAMNT,
         SUM(SALCASH) AS SALCASH,
         SUM(SALCURR) AS SALCURR,
         DATE_ AS LASTTRDATE,
         SUM(ONHAND) AS ONHAND,
         SUM(ACTWHOUSEIN) AS ACTWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(ACTWHOUSEOUT) AS ACTWHOUSEOUT,
         SUM(COUNTADD) AS COUNTADD,
         SUM(COUNTDEC) AS COUNTDEC,
         SUM(DISTRESERVED) AS DISTRESERVED,
         SUM(ONVEHICLE) AS ONVEHICLE,
         SUM(0) AS VARIANTREF,
   COALESCE(WH.COSTGRP,0) AS INVENCOSTGRP,
         MEETPLANIN AS MEETPLANIN,
         SUM(PLNRSRVPRODIN) AS PLNRSRVPRODIN,
         SUM(PLNRSRVPRODOUT) AS PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
         SUM(PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN) AS PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT) AS PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT
    FROM CTE CTE
    INNER JOIN
            "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WH
         ON (CTE.INVENNO = WH.NR)
    WHERE WH.FIRMNR = 323
GROUP BY STOCKREF,
         INVENNO,
         DATE_,
         COALESCE(WH.COSTGRP,0),
         MEETPLANIN
UNION ALL
  SELECT 1 AS LOGICALREF,
         STOCKREF,
         -1 AS INVENNO,
         DATE_,
         SUM(PLNPRODIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNPRODIN,
         SUM(PLNPRODOUT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNPRODOUT,
         SUM(PLNOTHERIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNOTHERIN,
         SUM(PLNOTHEROUT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNOTHEROUT,
         SUM(PLNWHOUSEIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(PLNWHOUSEOUT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNWHOUSEOUT,
         SUM(TEMPIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS TEMPIN,
         SUM(TEMPOUT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS TEMPOUT,
         SUM(RESERVED * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS RESERVED,
         SUM(ACTPORDER * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ACTPORDER,
         SUM(RECEIVED * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS RECEIVED,
         SUM(ACTPRODIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ACTPRODIN,
         SUM(ACTOTHERIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ACTOTHERIN,
         SUM(ACTSORDER * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ACTSORDER,
         SUM(SHIPPED * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS SHIPPED,
         SUM(ACTWASTE * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ACTWASTE,
         SUM(ACTOTHEROUT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ACTOTHEROUT,
         SUM(TRANSFERRED * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS TRANSFERRED,
         SUM(AVGVALUE*(-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            /
            (CASE WHEN SUM(ONHAND_AVG) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE SUM(ONHAND_AVG) END)
             AS AVGVALUE,
         SUM(AVGCURRVAL*(-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
           /
            (CASE WHEN SUM(ONHAND_AVG) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE SUM(ONHAND_AVG) END)
           AS AVGCURRVAL,
         SUM(PURAMNT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PURAMNT,
         SUM(PURCASH * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PURCASH,
         SUM(PURCURR * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PURCURR,
         SUM(SALAMNT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS SALAMNT,
         SUM(SALCASH * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS SALCASH,
         SUM(SALCURR * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS SALCURR,
         DATE_ AS LASTTRDATE,
         SUM(ONHAND * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ONHAND,
         SUM(ACTWHOUSEIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ACTWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(ACTWHOUSEOUT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            AS ACTWHOUSEOUT,
         SUM(COUNTADD * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS COUNTADD,
         SUM(COUNTDEC * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS COUNTDEC,
         SUM(DISTRESERVED * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            AS DISTRESERVED,
         SUM(ONVEHICLE * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS ONVEHICLE,
         SUM(0) AS VARIANTREF,
         -1 AS INVENCOSTGRP,
         MEETPLANIN AS MEETPLANIN,
         SUM(PLNRSRVPRODIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNRSRVPRODIN,
         SUM(PLNRSRVPRODOUT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNRSRVPRODOUT,
         SUM(PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNRSRVWHOUSEIN,
         SUM(PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT * (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1)) AS PLNRSRVWHOUSEOUT
    FROM CTE CTEALS
    INNER JOIN
            "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WH
         ON (CTEALS.INVENNO = WH.NR)
    WHERE WH.FIRMNR = 323
GROUP BY STOCKREF,
         DATE_,
         MEETPLANIN
